description: Environmental sensing: wind speed/direction (dpWind) and sea-state / wave-radar / current measurements, plus air-gap and wave-height fields from the motion-prediction logs.

datasets.signal_group: Wind (dpWind) + Sea state / current (WaveRadar) (ship data logger)
datasets.sampling: ~1 Hz, 2023-10-31 (full day), downsampled evenly to 2000 points

datasets.signal_group: Air gap / wave height (motion prediction log #1)
datasets.sampling: ~1 Hz, downsampled evenly to 1500 points (of 7799 total rows)
datasets.note: 'Wave directional spectrum' (2-D spectrum matrix) is excluded from this JSON due to size; it is available in the source CSV if needed for a dedicated wave-spectrum plot.

fields.note: No exact GMOD node without identifying the range-finder equipment.

datasets.signal_group: Air gap / wave height (motion prediction log #2)
datasets.sampling: ~1 Hz, downsampled evenly to 1500 points (of 7500 total rows)
datasets.note: 'Wave directional spectrum' (2-D spectrum matrix) is excluded from this JSON due to size.

fields.note: No exact GMOD node without identifying the range-finder equipment.
